positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a forest creature embracing the concept of connection. The central subject is a harmonious, stylized owl perched on a branch made of glowing bioluminescent mycelium. Around the owl, depict interconnected elements: stylized stars forming constellations, gently glowing forest spirits represented as abstract, flowing lines, and interconnected roots forming a web of life. The aesthetic should be modern folklore meets art deco, featuring clean, bold silhouettes and highly contrasting color blocking. Use a limited but vibrant color palette dominated by deep midnight blues, forest emeralds, soft gold accents, and touches of luminous teal. The composition must be perfectly balanced and highly symmetrical, designed as a seamless, repeat-friendly textile print. The style should resemble vector illustration quality, with crisp lines and flat color fields, making it visually striking on black or dark forest green fabric. Cinematic lighting, high detail, art paper texture.
negative: blur, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, artifact, noisy, grayscale, jpeg artifacts, overly complex, messy, realism, photorealistic, 3d render
